summary: Lead accepted M3-CHARACTER-OFFICE-FIXTURE-001 after systems_architect ACCEPT and independent lead gates. The accepted change adds validation-only FICTIONAL M3 character, relationship, office, landed power, persistent office policy, and enfeoffment hook fixture support across content schema, runtime parsing/indexing, content compiler/CLI, tests, and the M3 validation fixture. The diff is confined to allowed content/test/process paths and does not modify sim-core, protocol, save-format, UI, Electron, client packages, formal historical content, ADRs, gate docs, roadmap, checksums, or validation reports.
